changeSet.author: j.luginger
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO VISITPLANENTRY (VISITPLANENTRYID, VISIT_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, ORGANISATION_CONTACT_ID, PERSON_CONTACT_ID, RESPONSIBLE_CONTACT_ID, INFO, USER_NEW, USER_EDIT, DATE_NEW, DATE_EDIT) SELECT VISITRECOMMENDATIONID, cast(DUE_DATE as date), PRIORITY, SOURCE, CONTACT_ID, CONTACT_PERSON_ID, RESPONSIBLE, INFO, coalesce(USER_NEW, 'VisitrecommendationMigration'), USER_EDIT, coalesce(DATE_NEW, current_timestamp), DATE_EDIT FROM VISITRECOMMENDATION;

INSERT INTO VISITPLANENTRY (VISITPLANENTRYID, VISIT_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, ORGANISATION_CONTACT_ID, PERSON_CONTACT_ID, RESPONSIBLE_CONTACT_ID, INFO, USER_NEW, USER_EDIT, DATE_NEW, DATE_EDIT) SELECT VISITRECOMMENDATIONID, DUE_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, CONTACT_ID, CONTACT_PERSON_ID, RESPONSIBLE, INFO, coalesce(USER_NEW, 'VisitrecommendationMigration'), USER_EDIT, coalesce(DATE_NEW, current_date()), DATE_EDIT FROM VISITRECOMMENDATION;

INSERT INTO VISITPLANENTRY (VISITPLANENTRYID, VISIT_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, ORGANISATION_CONTACT_ID, PERSON_CONTACT_ID, RESPONSIBLE_CONTACT_ID, INFO, USER_NEW, USER_EDIT, DATE_NEW, DATE_EDIT) SELECT VISITRECOMMENDATIONID, DUE_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, CONTACT_ID, CONTACT_PERSON_ID, RESPONSIBLE, INFO, isnull(USER_NEW, 'VisitrecommendationMigration'), USER_EDIT, isnull(DATE_NEW, getdate()), DATE_EDIT FROM VISITRECOMMENDATION;

INSERT INTO VISITPLANENTRY (VISITPLANENTRYID, VISIT_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, ORGANISATION_CONTACT_ID, PERSON_CONTACT_ID, RESPONSIBLE_CONTACT_ID, INFO, USER_NEW, USER_EDIT, DATE_NEW, DATE_EDIT) SELECT VISITRECOMMENDATIONID, DUE_DATE, PRIORITY, SOURCE, CONTACT_ID, CONTACT_PERSON_ID, RESPONSIBLE, INFO, nvl(USER_NEW, 'VisitrecommendationMigration'), USER_EDIT, nvl(DATE_NEW, current_date), DATE_EDIT FROM VISITRECOMMENDATION;
